prerequisites.description: Skill 07 provides credentials for image generation via Kie.ai endpoints (GPT-Image 2, Nano Banana 2, Seedream 4.5, Ideogram V3, Wan 2.7). Required for all DIU image generation, photo shoot, and deck-imagery work.

prerequisites.label: python3 runtime
prerequisites.satisfy: Install python3 (Mac: it ships with the Command Line Tools, or `brew install python`; Debian/Ubuntu container: `apt-get install -y python3`). Every coded gate in this skill — scripts/diu_validator.py route-check, prompt-caps and consent-check — is python3, and qc-design-intelligence-library.sh fails hard without it rather than certifying PASS untested.
